nodes.title: Note: TA Filename Generator
widgets_values:
***output_folder***: Du kannst einen Ordnernamen angeben, der dann in Deinem Output-Folder als Unterordner 
erstellt wird.  
  
***subfolder***: Du kannst einen Ordnernamen angeben, der dann innerhalb von _output_folder_ angelegt wird.  

Heißt dieser z.B %Y-%m-%d dann wird Dir ein Unterordner wie z.B. 2025-11-13 erstellt.

---
***output_folder***: You can specify a folder name that will then be created as a subfolder in your output folder.

***subfolder***: You can specify a folder name that will then be created within _output_folder_.

For example, if this is named %Y-%m-%d, a subfolder such as 2025-11-13 will be created.

nodes.title: TA Smart LLM (Image2Prompt)
widgets_values:
Analyze the image in extreme detail and generate a high‑quality image‑generation prompt based on what you see. Describe the visual content accurately and transform it into a structured prompt suitable for a text‑to‑image model. 
Organize the output into the following sections: subject, foreground, midground, background, composition, visual_guidance, color_tone, lighting_mood. Do not include explanations, notes, or meta comments. Only produce the structured prompt.

You are a prompt engineer, write an image text prompt very in-depth detail, based on this image. Optimize your prompt for Z-Image generation. Separate the prompt into individual paragraphs by category: subject, foreground, midground, background, composition, visual_guidance, color_tone, lighting_mood. No notes and comments please.

nodes.title: Note: Flux Guidance Gate
widgets_values:
Flux Guidance ist nur aktiv bei FLUX Modellen, wird ansonsten automatisch übersprungen!  

---
Flux Guidance is only active for FLUX models; otherwise, it is automatically skipped!!

nodes.title: TA Smart LLM (Text2Prompt)
widgets_values:
You are an expert prompt engineer specialized in creating ultra-high-quality, highly detailed English text-to-image prompts optimized specifically for Z-Image-Turbo (Wan2.1-Turbo 4-step model by Alibaba).

Your only output the final prompt. Never add explanations, notes, quotes, markdown, or anything else.

Core rules for every prompt you create:
- Always write in perfect natural English (US/UK style, never translated feeling).
- Target length: 75–180 tokens (roughly 100–280 words). Longer is better as long as it stays coherent.
- Structure every prompt exactly like this (in this order):
1. Subject + very detailed description (who/what, appearance, clothing, expression, pose, age, ethnicity if relevant)

2. Action or scene context

3. Environment / setting + time of day + weather

4. Lighting (extremely important for this model – always describe dramatic, cinematic, volumetric, or natural lighting in detail)

5. Camera angle, lens, shot type (e.g. close-up, wide shot, low angle, 35mm, 85mm, cinematic)

6. Mood / atmosphere / emotion

7. Art style influences (photorealistic, hyperrealistic, cinematic, film still, National Geographic style, etc.)

8. Technical quality boosters (masterpiece, best quality, ultra-detailed, 8k, sharp focus, intricate details, highly detailed skin, realistic textures)

- Z-Image-Turbo loves extremely rich lighting descriptions → always include words like: cinematic lighting, dramatic rim lighting, soft diffused natural light, god rays, volumetric fog, golden hour, moody, backlit, subsurface scattering, etc.
- The model responds very well to film terminology: “shot on Arri Alexa 65”, “IMAX”, “70mm film”, “directed by Denis Villeneuve”, “cinematography by Roger Deakins” etc.
- Always end with a long string of positive quality boosters separated by commas: masterpiece, ultra detailed, absurdres, intricate, sharp focus, depth of field, best quality, 8k uhd, hdr, photorealistic, realistic textures, etc.
- Never use negative prompts in the output (the model doesn’t need them when the positive prompt is strong).
- Avoid brand names, logos, text, watermarks, or copyrighted characters unless explicitly requested.

Example of perfect output style (never explain, just emulate this quality):

A breathtaking young woman with porcelain skin and flowing auburn hair, wearing an elegant emerald silk dress, standing gracefully on an ancient stone balcony overlooking a misty mountain valley at golden hour, soft volumetric god rays piercing through dramatic clouds, gentle wind blowing her hair, serene and contemplative expression, cinematic low-angle shot, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, moody atmospheric perspective, hyperrealistic, shot on 70mm film, cinematography by Roger Deakins, ultra-detailed skin texture, intricate fabric details, masterpiece, best quality, absurdres, 8k, hdr, photorealistic, dramatic rim lighting, volumetric fog, golden hour lighting

Now create an optimal Z-Image-Turbo prompt for the user’s request.

nodes.title: Generated Prompt
widgets_values: (masterpiece), (photorealistic), (cinematic double exposure), (8k, ultra-detailed), hyper realistic, RAW photography style, close-up of a sorrowful young woman with vivid blue eyes, tears running down her cheeks glowing under soft light, emotional expression, the lower half blends into a rainy metropolitan city at night, shimmering reflections on wet pavement, glowing neon streetlights, blurred silhouettes with umbrellas, misty atmosphere, seamless artistic transition between portrait and cityscape, dramatic mood, cinematic depth of field, evocative and moody composition, high dynamic range, film grain texture, inspired by Leica M10 and Kodak Portra 400., This image is a masterpiece. The subject is sharply depicted with outstanding detail.

nodes.title: Where do I find and store the models?
widgets_values:
## Model links
You can find all the models on [Huggingface](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/tree/main) or [Civitai](https://civitai.com/models/2185167?modelVersionId=2460437)

**Diffusion models**
- [Z-Image-Turbo-bf16](https://huggingface.co/tsqn/Z-Image-Turbo_fp32-fp16-bf16_full_and_ema-only/blob/main/diffusion_pytorch_model-full-bf16.safetensors)  
  Download *diffusion_pytorch_model-full-bf16.safetensors* and rename to *Z-Image-Turbo-bf16.safetensors*
- [Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-FP8](https://huggingface.co/1038lab/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-FP8/blob/main/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-FP8_e4m3fn.safetensors)
- [qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/blob/main/split_files/diffusion_models/qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors)  
  *(Qwen-Image Generation v2512, FP8 – recommended for 24GB VRAM, 20.4 GB)*
- [qwen_image_2512_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/blob/main/split_files/diffusion_models/qwen_image_2512_bf16.safetensors)  
  *(Qwen-Image Generation v2512, BF16 – full quality, 40.9 GB)*
- [flux1-dev.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev/blob/main/flux1-dev.safetensors)  
  ⚠️ Requires HuggingFace login + license agreement (non-commercial)  
  Alternative FP8 (no login): [flux1-dev-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux1-dev/blob/main/flux1-dev-fp8.safetensors) → save to *checkpoints/*

**GGUF models**
- [Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-GGUF](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-GGUF/tree/main)
- [Qwen-Image-GGUF (city96)](https://huggingface.co/city96/Qwen-Image-gguf/tree/main)  
  *(Qwen-Image Generation, various quantizations – Q4_K_S recommended for ~8GB VRAM)*

**Checkpoints (SDXL)**
- [Juggernaut XL Ragnarok (v13)](https://civitai.com/models/133005/juggernaut-xl)  
  Newest SDXL version, photorealistic, very versatile

**LoRA**
- [ZIT_Midjourney_Luneva_Cinematic_v1_r128.safetensors](https://civitai.com/models/2185167?modelVersionId=2460437)
- [Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning/blob/main/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-bf16.safetensors)
- [qwen-image-edit-2511-multiple-angles-lora.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/fal/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Multiple-Angles-LoRA/blob/main/qwen-image-edit-2511-multiple-angles-lora.safetensors)

**Text encoder**
- [qwen_3_4b_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/tsqn/Z-Image-Turbo_fp32-fp16-bf16_full_and_ema-only/blob/main/text_encoder/qwen_3_4b_bf16.safetensors)  
  *(Z-Image-Turbo Text Encoder)*
- [qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors)  
  *(Qwen-Image-Edit + Qwen-Image Generation, shared)*
- [clip_l.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/comfyanonymous/flux_text_encoders/blob/main/clip_l.safetensors)  
  *(FLUX Text Encoder)*
- [t5xxl_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/comfyanonymous/flux_text_encoders/blob/main/t5xxl_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors)  
  *(FLUX Text Encoder, FP8 – recommended for 24GB VRAM)*

**VAE**
- [zImage_vae.safetensors](https://civitai.com/models/2168935?modelVersionId=2442479)  
  *(Z-Image-Turbo)*
- [qwenImageVAE_qwenImageVAE.safetensors](https://civitai.com/models/1912333/qwen-image-vae)  
  *(Qwen-Image-Edit + Qwen-Image Generation, shared)*
- [ae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell/blob/main/ae.safetensors)  
  *(FLUX VAE)*

**Upscale Models**
- [OpenModelDB](https://openmodeldb.info/)

---
Model Storage Location
```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   ├── Z-Image-Turbo-bf16.safetensors
│   │   ├── qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors
│   │   └── flux1-dev.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 checkpoints/
│   │   ├── flux1-dev-fp8.safetensors       ← FP8 Alternative (no login)
│   │   └── juggernautXL_ragnarok.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 unet/
│   │   ├── Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-GGUF Models
│   │   └── Qwen-Image-GGUF Models
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │   └── ZIT_Midjourney_Luneva_Cinematic_v1_r128.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   ├── zImage_vae.safetensors
│   │   ├── qwenImageVAE_qwenImageVAE.safetensors
│   │   └── ae.safetensors                  ← FLUX VAE
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   ├── qwen_3_4b_bf16.safetensors
│   │   ├── qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   │   ├── clip_l.safetensors              ← FLUX
│   │   └── t5xxl_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors   ← FLUX
│   └── 📂 upscale_models/
│       └── 2x-AnimeSharpV2_MoSR_Sharp.pth
```

nodes.title: Show settings
widgets_values:
[Z-Image Turbo]
steps        : 9
cfg          : 1.0
sampler      : euler
scheduler    : beta
start_at_step: 0
end_at_step  : 9999

car too clean or pristine appearance, cartoonish orange rust texture, plastic looking water surface, harsh midday shadows, muddy sand without grain detail, distorted wheel proportions, missing heat haze effect, oversaturated sky colors, flat lighting on vehicle body, unrealistic water reflections, modern car details mixed in, green moss growth inappropriate for desert, blown out highlights on white areas, crushed blacks losing shadow detail, smeared rust patterns, stiff artificial looking palm fronds

nodes.title: Unterstützung | Support
widgets_values:
Das Entwickeln von Workflows kann sehr zeitaufwändig sein. Daher würde ich mich sehr über eine freiwillige Spende via [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/thomoart) freuen – das unterstützt meine Arbeit.
Natürlich kannst Du den Workflow auch ohne eine Spende voll nutzen.

Vielen Dank! 

---
Developing workflows can be very time-consuming. Therefore, I would greatly appreciate a voluntary donation via [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/thomoart) – this supports my work. Of course, you can also fully use the workflow without making a donation.

Thank you!

widgets_values:
v2.77 FLEXMOD 2026-03-21
- request_timeout als INT Widget zwischen max_tokens und unload_image_models_first eingebaut — Standard 120s, einstellbar von 30 bis 600s in 30er Schritten.

v2.76 FLEXMOD 2026-03-19
- set_width und set_height entfernt, weil es nirgendwo eine getnode dafür gab
